channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: IPv6 may briefly have accounted for more than half of internet traffic
item.description: Has IPv6 finally reached its day of glory? It’s fair to say that IPv6 has not had the level of take-up expected when the Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) ratified it back in 1998. Take-up has been agonizingly slow, not reaching 5 percent of traffic until 2014.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Data centers are costing local governments billions
item.description: Tax benefits for hyperscalers and other data center operators are costing local administrations billions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to think about Apple Business
item.description: Apple Business is aimed at small businesses coalesced around Macs, iPhones, and iPads. If that’s you, and all your systems are made by Apple, the service is likely to be all you need to run a small operation of up to a few dozen seats.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 20 tricks for more efficient Android messaging
item.description: No matter what type of Android phone you carry or how you usually use it, one thing is a near-universal constant: You’re gonna spend a ton of time messing with messages. The messages may be from clients, colleagues, or your cousin Crissy from Cleveland (damn it, Crissy!).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI is finally delivering productivity
item.description: The productivity gains from AI are so great, companies can lay off thousands of employees and still get the same amount of work done — right? Or maybe it’s the opposite: despite all the hype, any supposed AI productivity boom is a mirage, causing employees, even developers, to experience heavier wo
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft Teams cheat sheet: How to get started
item.description: If your organization uses Microsoft 365 (a.k.a. Office), chances are you’ve encountered Teams, at least for video meetings. But it’s capable of a lot more, providing an effective way for groups of people to collaborate on work and advance business objectives.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft to cut Windows 365 price for SMBs
item.description: Microsoft will cut the price of Windows 365 subscriptions for small and mid-sized businesses by 20% next month, though analysts expect little impact on uptake of the Desktop-as-a-Service (DaaS) platform.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
